title: Review Issue Fixes - Semantic review findings
description: Fix issues 2-7 from the semantic review. Issue 1 (useColorExtraction render flicker) is deprioritized as the fix would require a complex refactor with minimal user-facing impact.
steps: Fix getSettingsSnapshot to return stable object reference instead of creating new object on every call
Fix ExpandedPlayer to include play/resume toggle and skip-next button, with body scroll lock
Fix CustomCursor to stop rAF loop when mouse is idle
Fix MusicInsights to derive popularity from track data instead of hardcoding 75%
Fix CollectionsManager to add confirmation before deleting a collection
acceptance_criteria: getSettingsSnapshot returns the same reference unless settings actually change
ExpandedPlayer shows play/pause toggle that changes icon based on playback state
ExpandedPlayer has a skip-next button that advances the queue
ExpandedPlayer locks body scroll when open
CustomCursor only runs rAF loop when mouse is moving, stops after idle timeout
MusicInsights derives popularity from available track metadata
CollectionsManager shows a confirmation dialog before deleting
